case_title: KHORGE, JIM VS ALDERSON, NANCY JOY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDERSON, NANCY JOY $915.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
